parameters.name: statements
parameters.value: =[{"statement":"MATCH (d:Document) WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS toLower($query) OR toLower(d.summary) CONTAINS toLower($query) RETURN d LIMIT 5","parameters":{"query":"{{ $json.query }}"}}]
